verdict: The chart suffers from severe rhythm quantization errors resulting in awkward 16th-note gallops and unplayable rapid vertical/horizontal transitions for a Medium difficulty.

issues.problem: Bad quantization creates uneven 16th-note 'gallops' (86ms / 259ms split) instead of standard, clean 8th-note streams.
Extremely fast opposing-panel transitions (U to D in 86ms) require awkward double-stepping or brackets, which is highly inappropriate for a Medium chart.
Fast lateral transitions (L to R / R to L in 86ms) disrupt physical flow and force double-steps.
The outro sequence becomes highly repetitive and physically tiring, relying on a monotonous pattern of quarter-note jumps and taps.
